## Security, privacy, and compatibility

- [ ] No tokens, terminal contents, source, credentials, private paths, or personal data are logged or committed
- [ ] Protocol/API/configuration compatibility was preserved or migration is documented
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes include failure-path coverage

## Documentation and UI evidence

- [ ] Documentation is updated or not affected
- [ ] UI changes include checked viewports/states and screenshots, or UI is not affected
